mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_calculate_paper ( paper_id, classroom_id, test_id, course_name, classroom_name, paper_name, test_name, catelog, creator, create_time, `row` ) VALUES
( #{item.paperId}, #{item.classroomId}, #{item.testId}, #{item.courseName}, #{item.classroomName}, #{item.paperName}, #{item.testName}, #{item.catelog}, #{item.creator}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.row} )
mapper.select: SELECT a.id as paperId, b.id as testId, b.name as testName, a.name as paperName, a.classroomName as classroomName, a.courseName as courseName, a.creatorId as creatorId, (SELECT username FROM st_users WHERE id = a.creatorId) as creator, a.createTime as createTime, a.catelog as catelog, a.classroomId as classroomId FROM pm_testpaper a JOIN pm_test b ON a.id = b.paperId WHERE a.classroomId = #{classroomId} AND a.`status` = 1 AND a.locked = 0
SELECT MAX(`row`) FROM ai_calculate_paper WHERE classroom_id = #{classroomId}

SELECT id, paper_id as paperId, classroom_id as classroomId, test_id as testId, course_name as courseName, classroom_name as classroomName, paper_name as paperName, test_name as testName, catelog, creator, create_time as createTime, `row` FROM ai_calculate_paper WHERE classroom_id = #{classroomId} Order By `row`

SELECT a.id as paperId, a.id as testId, a.name as paperName, a.name as testName, a.classroomId as classroomId, (SELECT classroomName FROM cm_classroom WHERE id = a.classroomId) classroomName, (SELECT courseChineseName FROM cm_course WHERE id = (SELECT courseId FROM cm_classroom WHERE id = a.classroomId) ) courseName, publisher as creator, publisherId as creatorId, (SELECT '3' FROM DUAL) as catelog, publishTime as createTime FROM pm_practice a WHERE a.status = 1 AND a.classroomId = #{classroomId}
